summary: Completed comprehensive testing of premium motion and final polish features for TradeLife dashboard. All entrance animations, hover effects, AI Core presence animations, and content integrity verified successfully.

minor_issues.issue: Theme switching mechanism not immediately accessible through settings button
minor_issues.impact: Theme switching functionality may require alternative access method (keyboard shortcut or separate control)

passed_tests: Dashboard loads at /dashboard with all content intact
Found exactly 8 elements with 'anim-reveal' class for staggered panel reveals
Stagger delays properly implemented with CSS --delay variables (0ms, 80ms, 120ms, 160ms, 200ms, 280ms, 300ms, 380ms)
AI Core icon has 'ai-presence' class with 4s infinite scale breathing animation (1→1.01→1)
AI Core light bleed has 'ai-glow-breathe' class with 4s infinite opacity breathing
All content counts match specification: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks, 4 stats
Panel hover effects working: translateY(-1px) transform and increased shadows
Action button hover effects working: transform, background, border-color, box-shadow changes
All transitions are 200ms with proper timing functions (cubic-bezier, ease-out)
Panel reveal animations: 400ms duration with translateY(8px) fade-in
Hero reveal animation: 500ms duration with translateY(6px) + scale(0.98→1)
AI breathing animation: 4s infinite loop with cubic-bezier timing
GPU acceleration enabled with will-change: opacity, transform
No bouncing, elastic, or dramatic animations detected
All entrance animations complete smoothly with full opacity
Keyframe animations properly defined: panel-reveal, hero-reveal, ai-breathe
Consistent 200ms transition durations across all interactive elements
success_percentage: frontend: 98% (1 minor theme switching accessibility issue)
